scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:reset: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:migrate:status: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate status
scripts.db:push: cd apps/backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:pull: cd apps/backend && npx prisma db pull
